name: developer-tools
description: Developer workflow automation — Jira, Git, code generation, and PR management
author: heliox-core

tools.name: jira_read_ticket
tools.description: Read a Jira ticket by ID and return its summary, description, and status

tools.name: git_clone_repo
tools.description: Clone a Git repository to a local directory

tools.name: git_create_branch
tools.description: Create and checkout a new Git branch in a repository

tools.name: code_generate
tools.description: Generate code files from a natural language specification using the LLM planner

tools.name: git_commit_push
tools.description: Stage all changes, create a commit with a message, and push to remote

tools.name: github_open_pr
tools.description: Open a pull request on GitHub using the gh CLI
